revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[古代]]の[[中国哲学]]([[:en:Category:Classical Chinese philosophy|Classical Chinese philosophy]])に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソー...'
revision.text:
[[古代]]の[[中国哲学]]([[:en:Category:Classical Chinese philosophy|Classical Chinese philosophy]])に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:こたいちゅうこくてつかく}} [[Category:中国哲学|こたい]] [[Category:古代哲学|ちゆうこく]]

{{デフォルトソート:こたいちゅうこくてつかく}} [[Category:中国哲学|こたい]] [[Category:古代哲学|ちゆうこく]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Contributions/Philosophicalconcepsjapan|Philosophicalconcepsjapan]] ([[User talk:Philosophicalconcepsjapan|会話]]) による版を 紀尾井坂 による版へ[[H:RV|巻き戻し]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[ja:Category:古代中国哲学]] [[ar:Category:فلسفة صينية قديمة]] [[commons:Category:Ancient Chinese philosophy]] [[eo:Category:Antikva ĉina filozofio]] [[es:Category:Filosofía antigua de China]] [[ko:Category:고대 중국 철학]] [[tr:Category:Antik Çin felsefesi]] [[uk:Category:Давньокитайська філософія]] [[ur:Category:قدیم چینی فلسفہ]] [[zh:Category:中国古代哲学]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Taoism]].

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[古代]]の[[中国哲学]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:こたいちゅうこくてつかく}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:古代中国哲学]]|version=98279339}} [[ja:Category:古代中国哲学]]

{{デフォルトソート:こたいちゅうこくてつかく}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:古代中国哲学]]}}

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"

Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
